\"Dear diary. Diaries are stupid. I hate: "Dear diary. Diaries are stupid. I hate them and I'm only writing this because I'm required to do so.
These past few days have been absolute h: These past few days have been absolute hell. My life has changed in the span of a couple hours.
Everything and everyone I once knew no l: Everything and everyone I once knew no longer matter.
At least that's what Spacea told me. She: At least that's what Spacea told me. She's a bitch, I hate her.
She probably doesn't even care about me. Only what I have to "offer" this program. Just let me die."
\"Dear diary, it's my second day here an: "Dear diary, it's my second day here and I've never felt so alone.
It feels like I'm in a prison with no ba: It feels like I'm in a prison with no bars. I can leave this house, this town, but I can't leave this time.
Crescent visited me today and handed me: Crescent visited me today and handed me a box filled with clothes. They were oddly pretty fashionable.
I tried to pick the scariest looking one: I tried to pick the scariest looking one so that no one would bother me. I don't think that worked, though.
Crescent seemed impressed by my clothing: Crescent seemed impressed by my clothing choice.  She said we were "made for each other".
If you ask me, she just looks like Ms. E: If you ask me, she just looks like Ms. EdgeQueen.  Whatever. "
"Irvin took me to Kugearen City today. It's a city just south of this small town.
There was something oddly nostalgic abou: There was something oddly nostalgic about this place. I quite enjoyed my time. That was until...
This old fart brought me to this restaur: This old fart brought me to this restaurant and forced me to get a job there.
Did I say I wanted a job?! I've only bee: Did I say I wanted a job?! I've only been here a few days! Give me a few to get adjusted, on God!
I yelled at him when I got home that nig: I yelled at him when I got home that night, and holy hell was I furious.
He just turned to me and said \"We need: He just turned to me and said "We need money."
WELL JOIN THE GODDAMN CLUB OF PEOPLE WHO: WELL JOIN THE GODDAMN CLUB OF PEOPLE WHO NEED THINGS. Over and out."
\"Dear diary, it's been a clean two week: "Dear diary, it's been a clean two weeks since I've been here and I rarely leave my room.
My old Pokémon were confiscated, but the: My old Pokémon were confiscated, but they allowed me to keep Togepi. I love Togepi so much. My last friend.
I don't know where they took the others,: I don't know where they took the others, but I miss them dearly.
I wonder how Ren, Venam, and \\PN are do: I wonder how Ren, Venam, and \PN are doing. I don't think I'll ever see them again and... I just don't know."
\"They rescued this boy named Kanon. He: "They rescued this boy named Kanon. He has dark brown hair and puppy dog eyes.
He practically looked like a deer in hea: He practically looked like a deer in headlights. He had no idea what was going on.
Can you really blame him, though? He was: Can you really blame him, though? He was probably snatched right before he met his end.
I guess I should get to know him. I hope: I guess I should get to know him. I hope Crescent wishes to be his friend as well.
Then we can be a trio or something. I've: Then we can be a trio or something. I've always wanted to be in a group of friends.
We're all here for each other, right...?: We're all here for each other, right...? "
\"Hey, it's been quite a long time since: "Hey, it's been quite a long time since I've written in this diary. I haven't even said "dear diary" or anything.
It's been about... over a year now or so: It's been about... over a year now or something?
I wasn't going to write in this thing, b: I wasn't going to write in this thing, but Kanon told me something that caught me off guard.
\"You look nothing like you did a year a: "You look nothing like you did a year ago."
A year ago. A year ago is when my life c: A year ago. A year ago is when my life changed.
My hair is much longer, my Pokémon are m: My hair is much longer, my Pokémon are much stronger.
Who am I? Am I still Melia? Am I someone: Who am I? Am I still Melia? Am I someone else?
If I appeared before everyone back in my: If I appeared before everyone back in my own time, would they recognize me?
This will probably be my last entry, bec: This will probably be my last entry, because I'm not Melia anymore, and this diary was issued for Melia. "
\"It seems all my training has prepared: "It seems all my training has prepared me for this day.  A day in which I plant the seed of my revenge on Team Xen.
Crescent told me that \\PN is in trouble: Crescent told me that \PN is in trouble and will most likely perish if I don't intervene.
If that didn't get me moving, it was the: If that didn't get me moving, it was the second objective.
To find out the truth behind Team Xen. W: To find out the truth behind Team Xen. Whatever that truth is... it's hidden at a place called Blacksteeple Castle.
If I can find out Team Xen's true motive: If I can find out Team Xen's true motive and save \PN's life, I'll be so happy.
Besides, I owe \\PN this for saving me b: Besides, I owe \PN this for saving me back at Goldenwood Forest three years ago.
I swear to you \\PN. No matter what, I w: I swear to you \PN. No matter what, I will save you.  Just wait for the woman called Emma.
There are tons of photos in the black no: There are tons of photos in the black notebook. One being of Irvin and a girl.

I guess it just means I'm grieving, but... This feels so bad.
It's a gaming system. It looks like it's: It's a gaming system. It looks like it's been used quite a bit.

You can hear the sound of someone pacing: You can hear the sound of someone pacing back and forth...

\"Dear Irvin, we have received your requ: "Dear Irvin, we have received your request and are delighted to see that things are moving nicely.
As a test for Venam and \\PN, we have ta: As a test for Venam and \PN, we have taken Kanon and the explosive orb.
They have been safely relocated to West: They have been safely relocated to West Gearen in the present time.
If Kanon is not rescued within the next: If Kanon is not rescued within the next few days, the orb will explode.
\\PN and Venam will take this test to be: \PN and Venam will take this test to become official members of our group.
As they are not official members, they a: As they are not official members, they are not allowed to know the classified info they have been presented.
Failure to succeed will result in their: Failure to succeed will result in their memories of this time being wiped.
As well as a tough penalty for Melia for: As well as a tough penalty for Melia for allowing in outsiders.
We have arranged another member of our g: We have arranged another member of our group to aid them in this quest."
